name: Before the Palace
description:
You see the palace of Cloudy Mountain before you.  The walls are covered with
silver and large tapestries bearing the colors and crest of Cloudy Mountain 
hang from the ledges and windows.  North is inside, and the court is east,
south, and west.

extra_descriptions.description:
A black mountain on a red background with two winged dragons crawling up both
sides.
